creator: chmeeedalf@gmail.com
text:
Nathan fixed this, it's a bug in the nVidia driver.  You can find his  
patch at http://people.freebsd.org/~nwhitehorn/new_xorg_ppc.diff

These really should go into ports, and I thought they had.

I just now ran into this problem myself, after running just fine for a  
long time with that patch, and it turned out I had recompiled and  
those patches had been lost in the Xorg update.

- Justin
